news.title: New Research Publication - Snow Variable Estimation
news.content: Our comprehensive systematic literature review on advances in image-based estimation of snow variables has been published in the Journal of Hydrology. This research examines cutting-edge techniques for snow parameter estimation using various image sensors.

news.title: Conference Presentation at Climate AI Workshop
news.content: Presented our latest research on leveraging social media for real-time climate impact monitoring at the SIGIR 2024 Workshop. The work demonstrates innovative approaches to using social media data for environmental monitoring.
